name: What Is Wrong With You?
short_description: Can you figure out all the wrong answers in a stack of 16 questions of increasing difficulty and win up to a virtual 250.000?[NOTE: This project currently gets ported from Unity into Godot Engine 4.3]
detailed_description:
Inspired by the phenomenon of "Who Wants To Be a Millionaire?" phenomenon, this game show idea turns everything upisde down! In life, you always have to make the right decisions and answer correctly.

But here everything is different!

The wrong answers are the right ones!

16 questions separate you from a virtual top prize of 250,000! You can expect multiple choice questions with 4 answers A-B-C-D, but we won't tell you how many answers are right or wrong. The further you get, the more money we add to your score!

If you want to win this show, you have to find and name all the wrong answers to all the given questions. At least 1 answer and a maximum of 3 answers are always correct!

If you fail the task, you go home empty-handed! Unless you reach the security levels for questions 4, 8 and 12, the further you go through the game, the more difficult it will be for you!

Are you ready?

The Show Must NOT Go On!
